message:
chore(brave-search): add wiremock dev-dependency + refresh Cargo.lock

Add wiremock to the brave-search connector's [dev-dependencies] so the
crate can grow HTTP-mock-based unit tests without every future PR
having to touch Cargo.toml first. The other connectors in this
workspace (snowflake, discord, slack, github, wolfram) all follow the
same pattern — wiremock pinned via `workspace = true` so version
drift is centralised.

  [dev-dependencies]
  wiremock.workspace = true

Cargo.lock picks up the new dev-dep edge for the brave-search package
entry. wiremock itself already builds in the workspace (it's used by
~6 other connector crates), so this is a graph-edge add, not a new
transitive chain.

Separate commit from the raptorq metamorphic-test drop because the
two changes are orthogonal — raptorq doesn't pull wiremock, and
brave-search doesn't pull raptorq.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -32,3 +32,6 @@ serde_json.workspace = true
 tracing.workspace = true
 tracing-subscriber.workspace = true
 url.workspace = true
+
+[dev-dependencies]
+wiremock.workspace = true
